data.name: Sex Bot Corp
data.detailed_description:
Lovense Integration

Sex Bot Corp is fully integrated with all Lovense toys!

Using the unique state-of-the-art RAID system, you can customize each of your toy to react to all or only certain sexual acts!

If your interested in buying a toy for the game please come visit the Discord account to get further details. You can purchase it at a discounted rate.


關於此遊戲

In this lusty 2D RPG you play as a robot from the evil Sex Bot Corporation. Cast magic or lust your way through.

Unlock sex machines you can ride to lust your enemies into submission. New abilities unlock new machines for different lusty scenes.

Besides the lust actions you can cast spells to fend off your foes.

Connect your Lovense sex toy and feel vibrations on the lusty actions. Different actions create different vibrations.
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: In this lusty 2D RPG you play as a robot from the evil Sex Bot Corporation. Cast magic or lust your way through. Unlock abilities and new spells along the way. Travel through a dystopian environment from desert, secret bases, cyberpunk cities and islands. Connect a Lovense sex toy as you play.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10/11
  • 處理器: Any modern system with up to date browser
  • 記憶體: 3 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Only runs on 64 bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: Any modern system with up to date browser
  • 記憶體: 3 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Only runs on 64 bit systems

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 10/11
  • Processor: Any modern system with up to date browser
  • Memory: 3 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Only runs on 64 bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 11
  • Processor: Any modern system with up to date browser
  • Memory: 3 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Only runs on 64 bit systems
